title: Cancer Crusher
degree: BCIS in Game Design And Game Development
event: National Vega Game Jam & Creative Conscience
awards: National Vega Game Jam Award Winner
summary: A 2D fixed shooter using retro-styled gameplay where you journey through the body to kill cancer. Players fight through 3 increasingly corrupted levels, each featuring 3 waves and a boss fight, raising awareness of testicular cancer in partnership with Love Your Nuts.
